scripts.build:legacy: pnpm run web:clean && pnpm run web:build && pnpm run web:index && pnpm run web:check
scripts.format:check: prettier --check package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml pagefind.yml vercel.json eslint.config.js playwright.config.mjs scripts/web_analytics_report.mjs "web/**/*.{css,html,js,mjs}"
scripts.catalog:site-data: pnpm --filter @prompts/catalog-core exec node bin/catalog.mjs generate site-data --root ../../catalog --out ../../apps/web/src/data/catalog.json --full-counts
scripts.catalog:readme: pnpm --filter @prompts/catalog-core exec node bin/catalog.mjs generate readme --root ../../catalog --shell-dir ../../catalog/shell --out ../../README.md --full-counts && python3 scripts/update_readme_badges.py --readme README.md
scripts.catalog:readme:check: pnpm --filter @prompts/catalog-core exec node bin/catalog.mjs generate readme --root ../../catalog --shell-dir ../../catalog/shell --out /tmp/prompts-readme-check.md --full-counts && python3 scripts/update_readme_badges.py --readme /tmp/prompts-readme-check.md && diff -q README.md /tmp/prompts-readme-check.md
scripts.catalog:fidelity:patterns: pnpm --filter @prompts/catalog-core exec node bin/catalog.mjs fidelity --root ../../catalog --readme ../../docs/catalog-migration/oracles/README.pre-catalog-ssot.md --kind patterns
